validation: all niches confirmed BLUE_OCEAN (no competitor streak app found)

niches_cleaned.notes: ProGuides is video courses at $10/mo — not a daily streak habit app. No streak competitor exists.
DnD Beyond serves rules/characters, NOT DM skill development. Gap confirmed.
BoardGameArena = play platform. BGG = database. Neither teaches strategy theory with streaks.
GTO+ and PioSOLVER require expert knowledge. No daily beginner-to-advanced streak path exists.
Masterclass has one-off courses — no daily streak gamified learning for game designers.
Gaming Historian (YouTube) and Did You Know Gaming have massive audiences but NO apps.
Cross-system TTRPG education (not game-specific) is completely unserved by any app.
Warhammer+ is streaming entertainment. No structured lore education app exists.
Lumosity/Elevate teach cognitive exercises, not puzzle-solving techniques and frameworks.
Speedrun.com is a leaderboard. No educational science-of-speedrunning app exists anywhere.
